## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing strategy collaboration between Mathmaji and fwd.digital for organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-augmented content creation services, producing \~100k words/month at scale](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Their approach combines AI workflows with human expertise for efficient, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Content marketing is viewed as a long-term strategy, typically showing significant results in 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Mathmaji aims to improve organic traffic, reduce CAC, and extend LTV for their math education platform](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows to decompose and augment traditional content creation steps](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Involves keyword research, competitor analysis, and relevance scoring](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Human editors guide the process and ensure quality control](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Aims to reduce content costs from $1-2/word to \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Accelerates content production to 50-100 posts/month (vs. 5/month traditionally)](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Shared example of HashiCorp's growth: 15M page views, $800k monthly traffic value](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Achieved $0.08 per session cost over 4 years (vs. $3-15 for paid ads)](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [DeepGram case: tripled brand search volume, contributing to Series C funding](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Client Diversity and Engagement Model

  - [Clients range from early-stage startups to public companies](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Industries include SaaS, e-commerce, travel, and various tech sectors](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Minimum 3-month engagement, with full ramp-up typically by month 3](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Pricing comparable to a junior US headcount for a full content team](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Mathmaji's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Exploring product-market fit through user research and interviews](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Aiming to improve unit economics: reduce CAC, extend LTV, increase conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Currently reliant on paid advertising, seeking to expand organic traffic share](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mathmaji to consider fwd.digital's offer and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [If interested, aim for the November 11th kickoff batch (or subsequent Monday kickoffs)](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide more information on availability for upcoming kickoff dates](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Mathmaji to follow up with any questions or decision on potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/52qhaq_EPhAARPyLiJxoUiREjXxDxa87?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
